channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This startup hired a sci-fi novelist to give its AI companions a soul
item.description: When Quentin Farmer was getting his startup Portola off the ground, one of the first hires he made was a sci-fi novelist. The co-founders began building the AI companion company in late 2023 with only a seed of an idea: Their companions would be decidedly non-human.
item.dc:creator: Emily McCrary-Ruiz-Esparza, Fast Company

item.title: I’ve driven the new electric Kia EV4 – and it finally makes hatchbacks exciting again for three key reasons
item.description: Kia's EV4 completes the Korean marque's line-up of excellent EVs and proves hatchbacks still have a place.
item.dc:creator: Leon Poultney, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Crystal Palace vs Manchester United: live stream Premier League 2025/26 game, TV channels, preview, team news
item.description: All the ways to watch Crystal Palace vs Manchester United live streams online and from anywhere as the Eagles look to inflict another loss on United.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Back, TechRadar

item.title: FBI says hackers have stolen $262 million in account takeover scams in 2025 so far - here's how you can stay safe
item.description: Cybercriminals have stolen hundreds of millions through AI-driven phishing, fake stores, and account takeover scams targeting users across financial platforms.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Want to save money on an Apple iPhone this holiday season? Try these 3 shopping hacks
item.description: Thanksgiving is behind us, which means the holiday shopping season has officially begun. And that means that both companies and third-party retailers will spend every day between now and Christmas morning trying to get you to spend your consumer dollars with them.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Wales vs South Africa free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch Wales vs South Africa live streams online, with the Springboks seeking a clean sweep in their 2025 Autumn Internationals campaign Cardiff.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: The Hunting Wives season 2: everything we know so far about the popular Netflix show's return
item.description: The Hunting Wives season 2 is officially in production. Here's everything we know so far about the hit Netflix show's return.
item.dc:creator: Grace Dean, TechRadar

item.title: Will Amazon refund you if Black Friday prices drop further? Here’s how it compares to other retailers
item.description: Some retailers in the US and the UK will give you money back if something you've bought then gets a further discount.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: 3 tech products that quietly made my life better in 2025
item.description: Hello once again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In. I didn’t buy a new phone this year. Or a new laptop, tablet, or smartwatch. That hasn’t been a hardship. I’ve just been perfectly content with the gear I already own—both a satisfying feeling and a boon to my pocketbook.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: How to stop AI from scanning your email
item.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter gives readers the latest AI technology advancements, covering the challenges and opportunities AI presents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google’s AI progress drives MediaTek to best week since 2002
item.description: MediaTek Inc. shares posted their best week since 2002, as artificial intelligence advances at its client Google help reshape the growth outlook for the Taiwanese chipmaker.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft gives Windows admins a legacy migration headache with WINS sunset
item.description: Microsoft has given system administrators until 2034 to stop using WINS (Windows Internet Name Service) NetBIOS name resolution technology in their networks — but even nine years may not be enough notice for some: WINS is very much still in use, supporting a niche range of difficult-to-replace legac
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI and Google quietly limit free Sora, Nano Banana Pro and Gemini 3 Pro use – here’s what it means for you
item.description: OpenAI and Google have quietly reduced free access to Sora, Nano Banana and Gemini 3 Pro as soaring demand pushes users toward paid plans.
item.dc:creator: Graham Barlow, TechRadar

item.title: El Capitan extends its supercomputer lead; top 10 lineup unchanged
item.description: El Capitan at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory maintained its spot as the world’s fastest supercomputer, and thanks to expansion, the 1.8-exaflop system extended its lead over the rest of the pack. El Capitan is once again followed by Frontier at No. 2 and Aurora at No.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.5 pricing cut signals a shift in the enterprise AI market
item.description: Anthropic has launched Claude Opus 4.5 with a 67% price cut that repositions its flagship model from a boutique offering to a production-ready enterprise tool.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft’s Fara-7B brings AI agents to the PC with on-device automation
item.description: Microsoft is pushing agentic AI deeper into the PC with Fara-7B, a compact computer-use agent (CUA) model that can automate complex tasks entirely on a local device.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Where AI meets cloud-native computing
item.description: In the past decade, we’ve seen two major advances in software development: cloud-native architecture and artificial intelligence. The first redefined how we build, deploy, and manage applications, and the second is becoming a mainstream utility.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple at NeurIPS: Why it matters
item.description: Apple’s decision to take part in (and co-sponsor) this year’s NeurIPS conference shows how the company is keeping close tabs on future trends in the field, highlights its willingness to cooperate, and shows Apple reaching out to recruit new expertise.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apstra founder launches Aria to tackle AI networking performance
item.description: There are a growing number of networking startups working to tackle the challenges of AI networking. Aria Networks is hoping that its differentiated approach based on rich network telemetry will actually solve real-world problems for network operators.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google issues warning on fake VPN apps
item.description: Google warns Android users about dangerous fake VPN apps hiding malware that steals passwords, banking details and personal data from phones and tablets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
